name: retrodigio--red-team
description: Adversarial multi-agent debate engine for stress-testing decisions, ideas, and strategies. Orchestrates multiple AI agents with conflicting worldviews (bull, bear, operator, contrarian, etc.) to debate a question through structured rounds, then synthesizes results into a decision brief. Use for: red team analysis, adversarial debate, stress testing ideas, devil's advocate, "what could go wrong" analysis, decision validation, pre-mortem exercises.
